questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: Consider the following countries: 1. Bahrain 2. Colombia 3. Democratic Republic of Congo 4. Latvia 5. Liberia. How many of the above countries were recently elected to serve as non-permanent members of the United Nations Security Council (UNSC)?
questions.explanation: All five countries listed were recently elected to serve as non-permanent members of the United Nations Security Council (UNSC).
questions.takeaway: Bahrain, Colombia, the Democratic Republic of Congo, Latvia, and Liberia are the recently elected non-permanent members of the UNSC.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Five countries, namely Bahrain, Colombia, the Democratic Republic of Congo, Latvia, and Liberia, were recently elected to serve as non-permanent members of the United Nations Security Council (UNSC).
